Privacy
Home Apps Support Privacy

Account & Data

Request deletion of your
account & data

You can permanently delete your account and all associated data from our apps at any time. This action is irreversible.

Applies to

Pakiza

How to delete your account

1

Send an email to support@hsrutility.com with the subject line:

Delete my account — Pakiza
2

Include the phone number or Google account email associated with your Pakiza account so we can locate and verify your data.

3

We will process your request within 7 business days and send a confirmation email once your account and data have been permanently deleted.

Email to Delete

What Gets Deleted

  • Your account — phone number or Google account link
  • In-app favourites, saved wallpapers, and custom preferences
  • Analytics identifiers (Firebase Analytics)
  • Push notification tokens (FCM)
  • All locally cached app data, upon uninstalling the app

What We Must Retain

Anonymised, aggregated analytics

14 months

Already anonymous — cannot be linked back to you after deletion.

Anonymised crash logs

90 days

For error tracking only; contains no personal identifiers after account deletion.

What data Pakiza stores

A breakdown of the personal data collected by the app.

Pakiza

Phone number or Google account info (authentication), saved favourites, in-app preferences, analytics identifiers, push notification token.

Email to Delete
Back to Support Privacy Policy
